summary: Comprehensive testing of Brand Portal feature (Slices 1-3). All 30 backend API tests passed. Frontend smoke tests verified all brand portal pages: login, reset-password, fabrics catalog, fabric detail, account (credit summary + ledger), orders, users. Admin Brands page tested with brand list, detail panel, credit lines OTP flow UI, sample credits adjustment UI.
passed_tests: Admin Brand CRUD: GET /api/admin/brands returns list with user_count
Admin Brand CRUD: GET /api/admin/brands/{id} returns detail with users
Admin Brand CRUD: POST /api/admin/brands requires admin auth
Admin Brand CRUD: POST /api/admin/brands creates brand + first brand_admin user with temp password
Admin Brand CRUD: PUT /api/admin/brands/{id} updates fields and allowed categories
Brand User Management: POST /api/admin/brands/{id}/users creates new brand user
Brand User Management: DELETE /api/admin/brands/{id}/users/{uid} suspends user
Brand Auth: POST /api/brand/login returns JWT with must_reset_password flag
Brand Auth: POST /api/brand/login with invalid password returns 401
Brand Auth: GET /api/brand/me works with token
Filtered Catalog: GET /api/brand/fabrics returns fabrics only from allowed_category_ids
Filtered Catalog: GET /api/brand/fabrics/{id} returns fabric if category allowed
Credit Line OTP: POST /api/admin/brands/{id}/credit-lines/otp requires valid lender (Stride/Muthoot/Mintifi)
Credit Line OTP: POST /api/admin/brands/{id}/credit-lines/otp requires positive amount
Credit Line OTP: POST /api/admin/brands/{id}/credit-lines/otp returns otp_request_id + sent_to
Credit Line OTP: POST /api/admin/brands/{id}/credit-lines with invalid OTP returns 400
Credit Summary: GET /api/brand/credit-summary returns credit{total_allocated,total_utilized,available,lines[]} + sample_credits{total,used,available}
Brand Ledger: GET /api/brand/ledger returns entries sorted desc
Admin Credit Lines: GET /api/admin/brands/{id}/credit-lines returns lines
Admin Ledger: GET /api/admin/brands/{id}/ledger returns entries
Sample Credits: POST /api/admin/brands/{id}/sample-credits with positive delta adds credits
Sample Credits: POST /api/admin/brands/{id}/sample-credits cannot reduce below used
Brand Orders: GET /api/brand/orders returns orders for this brand only (isolation)
Brand Orders: POST /api/brand/orders with insufficient credit returns 400
Brand Orders: POST /api/brand/orders with disallowed category returns 403
Razorpay Topup: POST /api/brand/sample-credits/topup/create-order with amount<100 returns 400
Razorpay Topup: POST /api/brand/sample-credits/topup/create-order returns razorpay_order_id+amount_paise+key_id
Razorpay Topup: POST /api/brand/sample-credits/topup/verify with invalid signature returns 400
Role-based: brand_user (non-admin) cannot POST /api/brand/users (403)
FIFO Debit verified via ledger: Stride ₹100,000 fully used + Muthoot ₹113,840 partial = ₹213,840 total
frontend_tests_passed: /brand/login loads with email, password inputs and submit button
Brand login with temp password redirects to /brand/reset-password
/brand/reset-password shows current password, new password, confirm password fields
Password reset successful redirects to /brand/login
Login with new password redirects to /brand/fabrics
/brand/fabrics shows 169 fabrics from allowed categories (Cotton, Denim)
/brand/fabrics has search input and fabric grid
/brand/account shows credit summary cards (Available ₹3,86,160, Total ₹6,00,000, Utilized ₹2,13,840)
/brand/account shows credit lines table with Stride and Muthoot entries
/brand/account shows sample credits (190 available, 310 used, 500 total)
/brand/account shows Razorpay top-up card with amount input
/brand/account shows ledger with FIFO debit breakdown
/brand/orders shows 2 orders (sample ₹310, bulk ₹2,13,840)
/brand/users shows 4 users with Invite user button (brand_admin access)
/admin/brands page loads with Create Brand button
/admin/brands shows brands table with GST, Categories, Users, Status columns
Admin brand detail panel shows credit lines section with OTP request flow
Admin brand detail panel shows sample credits adjustment section
Admin brand detail panel shows users list with Add User button
Admin sidebar has 'Brands' nav item
critical_code_review_comments: Brand router properly implements FIFO debit logic in _debit_credit_fifo function
OTP verification uses bcrypt for secure code hashing
Ledger entries include debits[] array with per-line breakdown for audit trail
Sample credits use integer math (₹1 = 1 credit) to avoid floating point issues
Razorpay signature verification uses hmac.compare_digest for timing-safe comparison
All brand endpoints properly filter by brand_id for data isolation
Frontend BrandAuthContext correctly stores token in localStorage with lf_brand_token key

test_credentials.brand_admin: brandtest@locofast.com / NewPassword123! (reset from temp password GQRh59B87Zod)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing pre-seeded brand data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand Portal feature fully tested. Test Brand Co has: 2 credit lines (Stride ₹100k fully used, Muthoot ₹500k with ₹386k available), 500 sample credits (190 available), 2 orders placed. Password was reset from temp to NewPassword123!. All CRUD, auth, filtered catalog, credit line OTP, FIFO debit, sample credits, and Razorpay top-up endpoints verified working.
